title: Software Engineer
required_skills: Python, Java, C++, Git, Data Structures, Algorithms, OOP
description: We are seeking a versatile Software Engineer to design, build, and support critical software applications. You will work across the full stack, write clean code, and collaborate in an agile environment.

title: Backend Engineer
required_skills: Python, Flask, Django, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Docker, Redis
description: Join our platform team to build scalable server-side systems. You will design robust APIs, optimize database queries, manage microservices pipelines, and maintain highly available backend architectures.

title: Frontend Developer
required_skills: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Webpack, Git
description: We are looking for a creative Frontend Developer to craft beautiful, responsive, and intuitive web experiences. You will translate designs into premium component code using modern React stacks.

title: Full Stack Developer
required_skills: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JavaScript, REST APIs, AWS, HTML, CSS
description: Looking for a Full Stack Developer capable of owning features from end to end. You will build user-friendly interfaces and implement the backing server-side logic and database schemas.

title: Data Scientist
required_skills: Python, SQL, R, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, Statistics, Data Visualization, Tableau
description: Analyze large datasets to extract actionable insights and build predictive models. You will help drive business decisions by turning raw metrics into interactive dashboards and reports.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
required_skills: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn, MLOps, SQL, Linear Algebra, Keras
description: Develop and deploy deep learning models at scale. You will build end-to-end data training pipelines, optimize neural networks for inference, and integrate AI features into production.

title: DevOps Engineer
required_skills: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Jenkins, Bash, Linux, Git
description: Optimize our software delivery pipeline and manage cloud infrastructure. You will write infrastructure-as-code, configure CI/CD automations, and manage containers in high-traffic environments.

title: Cloud Engineer
required_skills: AWS, Azure, GCP, Cloud Security, Serverless, IAM, Linux, Terraform, Networking
description: Design and implement secure, scalable cloud architectures. You will migrate legacy systems, manage multi-region availability, and work to keep cloud infrastructure cost-efficient.

title: Android Developer
required_skills: Kotlin, Java, Android SDK, Jetpack Compose, Retrofit, MVVM, SQLite, Git
description: Build high-performance mobile apps for the Android platform. You will collaborate on API designs, write clean Jetpack Compose layouts, and ensure fluid performance across device form factors.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
required_skills: Penetration Testing, Network Security, SIEM, Firewalls, Cryptography, Linux, Wireshark
description: Protect our networks and digital assets. You will monitor security logs, perform regular vulnerability assessments, respond to threat incidents, and enforce corporate compliance.

title: iOS Developer
required_skills: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, CoreData, Xcode, CocoaPods, REST APIs, Git
description: Create responsive and premium iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI. You will implement smooth animations, offline database syncing, and publish applications directly to the App Store.

title: Data Engineer
required_skills: Python, Apache Spark, Hadoop, SQL, ETL, Snowflake, Airflow, Scala
description: Design and build data warehouse pipelines. You will orchestrate ETL flows, ingest data streams from web hooks and databases, and optimize big data systems for analytical queries.

title: QA Automation Engineer
required_skills: Selenium, Cypress, Python, JavaScript, Unit Testing, QA, CI/CD, PyTest
description: Ensure the highest software quality by creating automation test suites. You will build end-to-end test scenarios, write unit tests, and integrate automated quality checks into CI/CD pipelines.

title: UI/UX Designer
required_skills: Figma, Adobe XD, Wireframing, Prototyping, CSS, User Research, UI Design
description: Design interfaces that users love. You will conduct user research, create wireframes and high-fidelity mockups, and work closely with engineers to ensure pixel-perfect CSS styling.

title: Systems Administrator
required_skills: Linux, Active Directory, Bash, Networking, DNS, Security, Scripting, VMware
description: Manage our internal network infrastructure, user systems, and virtual machine setups. You will perform updates, monitor system health, and secure system endpoints.

title: Product Manager
required_skills: Agile, Scrum, Product Strategy, Roadmap, Jira, Analytics, UX Principles
description: Define the vision and product roadmap. You will coordinate with engineering, design, and marketing teams to prioritize features and deliver value to our customer base.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
required_skills: C, C++, RTOS, Microcontrollers, Firmware, Embedded Linux, I2C, SPI
description: Write low-level code and firmware for IoT hardware devices. You will interface with microcontrollers, write real-time OS drivers, and debug hardware setups with logic analyzers.

title: Blockchain Developer
required_skills: Solidity, Ethereum, Web3.js, Smart Contracts, Go, Cryptography, Rust
description: Design and develop decentralized applications (DApps) and secure smart contracts. You will build on Ethereum/EVM blockchains and optimize contracts for gas consumption.

title: Database Administrator
required_skills: SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle, Backup & Recovery, Performance Tuning, Clustering
description: Oversee the design, installation, and optimization of relational database management systems. You will optimize query performance, manage backup schedules, and guarantee uptime.

title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
required_skills: Python, Linux, Prometheus, Grafana, AWS, Kubernetes, Shell Scripting, Incident Response
description: Focus on system reliability, uptime, and performance metrics. You will build telemetry systems, coordinate incident post-mortems, and script solutions to automate operational tasks.

title: AI Research Scientist
required_skills: Python, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, PyTorch, LaTeX, Research Papers
description: Conduct cutting-edge research in deep learning, natural language processing, or generative modeling. You will author research plans, build prototypes, and publish findings.

title: Game Developer
required_skills: C#, Unity, C++, Unreal Engine, 3D Mathematics, Shaders, Physics, Git
description: Develop gameplay mechanics and core features in C# or C++ for PC, console, or mobile. You will optimize rendering pipelines, construct game states, and collaborate with 3D artists.

title: Solutions Architect
required_skills: Cloud Architecture, AWS, System Design, Microservices, Enterprise Software, Security
description: Translate business needs into reliable technical architectures. You will lead design reviews, propose multi-tenant systems, and advise client engineering squads on best practices.

title: Salesforce Developer
required_skills: Apex, Visualforce, Lightning Components, CRM, Java, JavaScript, SOQL
description: Customize and extend Salesforce instances. You will build APEX classes, Lightning web components, and integrate third-party APIs to streamline corporate sales funnels.

title: IT Support Specialist
required_skills: Windows, macOS, Troubleshooting, Helpdesk, Networking, Active Directory, Customer Service
description: Provide user-facing tech support for computer hardware and operating systems. You will troubleshoot network connectivity, manage access lists, and answer client queries.

title: Penetration Tester
required_skills: Kali Linux, Metasploit, Python, OWASP Top 10, CEH, Vulnerability Analysis, Cryptography
description: Conduct authorized security evaluations of networks, web applications, and APIs. You will write exploit scripts, perform social engineering, and report on remediation paths.

title: Data Analyst
required_skills: SQL, Excel, Python, PowerBI, Tableau, Statistics, Reporting, Data Cleansing
description: Transform data into actionable visualizations. You will write complex database queries, build automated reporting dashboards, and clean raw datasets for business teams.

title: NLP Specialist
required_skills: Python, NLTK, SpaCy, Transformers, BERT, Hugging Face, Machine Learning, Regex
description: Design algorithms to process and analyze text data. You will build entity extractors, semantic search parses, translation systems, and sentiment analyzers.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
required_skills: Python, OpenCV, PyTorch, CNNs, Image Processing, C++, YOLO, TensorFlow
description: Develop visual analysis pipelines for object tracking, classification, and segmentation. You will build robust systems to extract information from images and video feeds.

title: Technical Writer
required_skills: Markdown, Git, HTML, Documentation, Technical Copywriting, API Documentation
description: Write clear, structured developer documentation, API references, and user guides. You will work with engineers to explain complex system components in plain language.

title: Network Engineer
required_skills: Cisco, Routing & Switching, Firewalls, VPN, DNS, WAN, CCNA, Network Architecture
description: Design, implement, and maintain enterprise routing and switching infrastructure. You will manage VPN tunnels, firewalls, load balancers, and diagnose packet losses.

title: ScyllaDB / NoSQL Specialist
required_skills: ScyllaDB, Cassandra, NoSQL, Database Modeling, Linux, Java, Go, Distributed Systems
description: Model and optimize ultra-low latency distributed NoSQL datastores. You will tune replication factors, design partition keys, and manage cluster expansions.
